name: The Dread Pageant
inspire: After an Action step, if all friendly fighters are damaged, or if there are more damaged fighters than there are undamaged fighters, Inspire each friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Gross Hubris
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after making an Attack roll for a damaged friendly fighter if that roll contains no successes.
reactions.flavorText: Failure is as inconceivable to the Dread Pageant as it is completely unpalatable.
reactions.rulesText: You can re-roll any Attack dice in that roll. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Speed of Slaanesh
abilities.flavorText: The grace of the Dark Prince infuses his warriors, granting them a scintillating swiftness of body and mind.
abilities.rulesText: Inspired damaged friendly fighters have +1 Move while using Charge abilities.

abilities.name: Cruel Pangs
abilities.flavorText: Enemies and allies of Slaanesh soon learn the folly of their avarice.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Pick a fighter holding a treasure token. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Swift as Desire
abilities.flavorText: The Hedonites of Slaanesh are feared throughout the realms for their breathtaking speed and agility.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Push each damaged friendly fighter 1 hex. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Drown in Pain
abilities.flavorText: To worshippers of the Lord of Excess, pain is just one more thing to experience in the cornucopia of existence.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Give each damaged friendly fighter a Guard token. You can only use this ability once per game.
